title: The Death of 'Ubaydallah b. Ziyad
description: According to Hisham b. Muhammad [al-Kalbi ]-Abu MikhnafAbu al-$ alt [al-Taymi]-Abu Said al -$aygal, who said: We departed with Ibn al-Ashtar, heading toward Ubaydallah b. Ziyad and the Syrians who were with him. We went out quickly, not turning aside, wanting to encounter him before he entered the land of Iraq.283 (Continuing,] he said: We arrived well before him at the borders of the land of Iraq and pushed on into the land of alMawsil.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
